speaker: speaker1
text: Hello . I bought a China dress in your shop this morning .

speaker: speaker1
text: I bought it one size up by mistake .

speaker: speaker1
text: I wonder if you can change it to one size down .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , of course.Will you come with the receipt ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Then I'll come to your place later in the evening , and how late is your shop open ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Until 8 o'clock , ma'am . We are looking forward to seeing you .
